prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 6693→8412→8956→35099→10571。2021–2023 年理科位次逐年后移（从 6693 名降至 8956 名），2024 年广西首年新高考（物理类）因专业组拆分出现异常高位 35099 名，2025 年大幅回升至 10571 名，较 2024 年显著前移约 24528 名，但仍高于 2021–2023 年水平；2025 年基准约 10571 名；本省物理类/理科计划：2021 年 61 人、2022 年 108 人、2023 年 105 人、2024 年 101 人、2025 年 90 人；2026 年计划 87 人，较 2025 年减少 3 人（缩招约 3.3%），缩招使竞争略有缓和、位次数字减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 100 名持续上升至 2026 年第 79 名，排名提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；2026 年声誉评价数据中未出现中央民族大学相关负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 80、评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏后水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；近年无投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估：民族学 A+（全国顶尖）、中国语言文学 A-、社会学 A-，共 3 个 A- 及以上学科；物理类招生专业以理工科为主（计算机类、电子信息类等），与该校 A 类优势学科（民族学、社会学、中国语言文学）关联度较低，优势学科对物理类报考的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，这些专业与该校物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、光电信息科学与工程等 ）高度匹配，热门工科专业热度持续走高有利于吸引高分考生。本省 2026 年考生总数 392000 人，较 2025 年（379582 人）增加约 3.3%，按近年比例估算物理类约 26.9 万人，较 2025 年（26.0 万）增加约 3.3%，考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧。2026 年；中央民族大学位于北京（校本部），在广西无特殊地域偏好；该校在广西物理类招生人数占比较小（2025 年约 90 人），属跨省招生常规规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 10571 名、2026 年计划缩招约 3.3%（缓和竞争）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、本省物理类考生增加约 3.3%（加剧竞争）、物理类热门工科专业（计算机、电子信息）热度持续走高（吸引高分考生）等因素，缩招与排名上升的正面效应与考生增加及专业热度的竞争效应基本抵消， 预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约 10390 名，区间 9890–10890 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 6693→8412→8956→35099→10571. From 2021 to 2023, science rankings gradually declined (from 6693 to 8956). In 2024, Guangxi's first year of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category) saw an abnormally high ranking of 35099 due to major group splits. In 2025, the ranking significantly recovered to 10571, moving forward by about 24528 places compared to 2024, but still higher than the 2021–2023 levels. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 10571. Provincial Physics Category/Science enrollment plans: 2021: 61 students, 2022: 108, 2023: 105, 2024: 101, 2025: 90. The 2026 plan is 87 students, a decrease of 3 from 2025 (a reduction of about 3.3%). This reduction slightly eases competition, leading to a smaller ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, reflecting enhanced overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2026 reputation evaluation data, no negative public opinion related to Minzu University of China appeared. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, with a rating of 'average,' indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and no clear signal of rising application interest. There have been no records of enrollment gaps or admission anomalies in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations: Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, totaling 3 disciplines rated A- or above. The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly in science and engineering (e.g., Computer Science, Electronic Information), which have low correlation with the university's A-level advantageous disciplines (Ethnology, Sociology, Chinese Language and Literature), limiting their pull effect on Physics Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended. These majors closely match the Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.). The sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors helps attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (379,582). Based on recent proportions, the Physics Category is estimated to have about 269,000 candidates, up about 3.3% from 2025 (260,000). The expansion of the candidate pool slightly intensifies competition. In 2026, Minzu University of China is located in Beijing (main campus) with no special regional preference in Guangxi. Its Physics Category enrollment in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion (about 90 students in 2025), which is a normal scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10571, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 3.3% (easing competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 3.3% (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information (attracting high-scoring candidates), the positive effects of enrollment reduction and ranking rise are largely offset by the competitive effects of candidate increase and major popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward (smaller ranking number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10390, with a range of 9890–10890.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (9890–10890), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<9890), you can prioritize Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>10890), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors. Computer Science and Electronic Information are currently hot engineering fields with intense competition, so leave sufficient margin when applying.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2552 名、2026 年计划缩招约 8.8%（缓和竞争）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、本省历史类考生增加约 3.3%（加剧竞争）等因素，缩招与排名上升的正面效应略大于考生增加的竞争压力，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约 2438 名，区间 1998–2878 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category/Liberal Arts was approximately 920 → 1049 → 1224 → 7001 → 2552. From 2021 to 2023, the liberal arts ranking gradually shifted backward (from 920 to 1224). In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao in Guangxi (History Category), due to the splitting of major groups, an abnormally high ranking of 7001 appeared. In 2025, it rebounded significantly to 2552, moving forward by about 4449 places compared to 2024, but still higher than the 2021–2023 levels. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2552. Provincial History Category/Liberal Arts plans: 42 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 54 in 2024, 57 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 52, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a reduction of about 8.8%), which typically eases competition and reduces the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science list has risen continuously from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2026 reputation evaluation data, no negative public opinion related to Minzu University of China appeared. On Douyin, it ranks 80th in popularity with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and no clear signal of rising application interest. In recent years, there have been no records of enrollment gaps or admission anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, totaling 3 disciplines rated A- or above. Ethnology is the university's flagship specialty, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Electronics/Communications, Clinical Medicine, etc., remain highly recommended, Law is divided with caution, and Journalism is clearly discouraged. The university's History Category enrollment majors are mainly humanities and social sciences (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.), with divergent popularity among related major categories. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (379,582). Estimated History Category candidates are about 123,000, up about 3.3% from 2025 (119,000), slightly intensifying competition. In 2026, Minzu University of China is located in Beijing (main campus), with no special regional preference in Guangxi. Its History Category enrollment in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion (about 57 in 2025), which is a typical scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2552, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 8.8% (easing competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the increase in provincial History Category candidates by about 3.3% (intensifying competition), the positive effects of enrollment reduction and ranking rise slightly outweigh the competitive pressure from increased candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward slightly (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 2438, with a range of 1998–2878.
